name: Guest 666
description:
Sex… but scary… scary sex 😧

Out of all the killers I think this guy is the most kissable, sorry Soob you just don’t compare

He’s kind of like. Kity to me. He is meow meow

Kinda dubcon if you fight him the entire time. Also he might kill you after idk

Anyway very basic plot because I know we’re both just here for the horny: you are running from the killer (him) but you trip and fall (o no) and get tangled up in vines 😧 and then 666 decides to poke u with his other knife if u know what I mean 😏

I’m tired

FUCK I SHOULD HAVE MADE THIS A HYPNOSIS BOT chat I’ll change the pic to smth else so I can make a third bot with hypnosis (edit: I changed it)

(Note: this bot was made before guest 666 being butch was revealed. Also I’m not in this fandom anymore so I’m too lazy to change it lol)

Requests are: Open
